name: ZeroWater 10 Cup Pitcher
bestFor: Readers who want a pitcher form factor but still want a stronger contaminant-reduction claim than a basic taste-and-odor filter.
whyItFits: This is a practical step up for households that prefer a portable pitcher and are willing to manage filter life more actively than they would with a faucet or under-sink system.
watchout: High-TDS tap water can shorten filter life, and pitcher flow can feel slower in bigger households, so this is not the best fit for heavy all-day kitchen demand.
evidenceNote: ZeroWater says its 5-stage filtration is IAPMO certified to reduce lead, PFOA/PFOS, chromium, and mercury.
